body: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This bot-filed issue requests documentation improvements for `Azure.ResourceManager.CarbonOptimization` — specifically adding service-specific code examples and expanding the Key Concepts section of the README after the 1.0.1 GA patch release.

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.CarbonOptimization` (v1.0.1)
**Affected API:** README / documentation, `tests/Samples/` folder
**Scenarios:**
- Examples section only has a generic link; no inline code snippets for carbon emissions queries
- Key Concepts section is a stub (generic SDK link only, no CarbonOptimization-specific concepts)
- No `tests/Samples/` subfolder with `#region Snippet:` markers for `Update-Snippets.ps1`
- Non-standard `## Documentation` section present that should be folded into standard sections
- Install section lacks an explicit stable version qualifier

**Root ask:** Add service-specific code snippets (query carbon emissions, list by subscription, export reports), expand Key Concepts with CarbonOptimization-specific content, and restructure the README to match the canonical template.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔎 Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This is a documentation-only issue filed by an automated bot workflow after the 1.0.1 patch release. No runtime bug is present.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Review the existing README at `sdk/carbon/Azure.ResourceManager.CarbonOptimization/README.md`
2. Check generated samples in `samples/Generated/Samples/Sample_TenantResourceExtensions.cs` as a starting point for real API usage
3. Create `tests/Samples/Sample1_QueryCarbonEmissions.cs` with `#region Snippet:` markers and run `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 carbon` to inject into README
4. Reference `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md` as a canonical structure example

**Similar open issue:** #58441 covers essentially the same documentation gap for the same package (triggered by the preceding version bump). This issue may be a **duplicate** of #58441.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Mgmt` — package name `Azure.ResourceManager.CarbonOptimization` starts with `Azure.ResourceManager.*`, unambiguously a management-plane library
- **Service:** `Carbon Optimization` — confirmed by service directory `sdk/carbon/` and by issue #58441 (same package, same bot, same labels applied)
- **Confidence:** High — explicit package name in issue title and body, confirmed by reference issue #58441
- **Duplicate:** Issue #58441 is open, filed by the same bot, about the same package and the same documentation gaps
</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %Mgmt` (line 887) — no Carbon Optimization–specific ServiceLabel entry exists; the `%Mgmt` catch-all matched because the issue has the "Mgmt" label
- **AzureSdkOwners:** @ArthurMa1978
- **ServiceOwners:** none listed for this entry
- **Routing action:** Assigned `@ArthurMa1978`; "needs-team-attention" not added (issue is bot-filed, not customer-reported)
- **Scan notes:** Scanned bottom-to-top from end of CODEOWNERS; no `%Carbon Optimization %Mgmt` or `%Carbon Optimization` entry found; all management-specific service entries (lines 890–1201) did not match "Carbon Optimization"; fell back to `%Mgmt` catch-all at line 887
</details>
